title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement link
scenario: Verify that tapping the License Agreement link on the EULA page navigates to the latest license agreement URL (https://www.hp.com/go/sweula).
steps: Locate and tap the License Agreement link.
Observe the page that opens after tapping the link.
Verify the URL of the opened page.
expected: The user is directed to the License Agreement page with the URL https://www.hp.com/go/sweula.
